theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, immersive, and premium UI. Minimalist layouts, generous white space, soft overlapping elements, and high-end glassmorphism.

font_primary.name: Playfair Display
font_primary.usage: Headings (H1, H2, H3), large quotes, cinematic titles.

font_secondary.name: Poppins
font_secondary.usage: Body text, navigation, buttons, small labels, UI elements.

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/10 dark:bg-black/20 border-b border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
navigation.links: font-poppins text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:text-accent transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-poppins font-medium hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-slate-900 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-poppins font-semibold hover:bg-accent/90 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-hover_accent relative overflow-hidden

cards.destination: relative group overflow-hidden rounded-[30px] aspect-[3/4] cursor-pointer
cards.tour_package: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-[24px] overflow-hidden shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover_primary transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 border border-border

components.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-glass_bg border border-glass_border shadow-glass rounded-[24px]

hover_effects.button_ripple: Implement Framer Motion tap/ripple effect on click

scroll_animations.fade_up: Initial: opacity-0, y-10. Animate: opacity-1, y-0. Duration 0.8s ease-out.
scroll_animations.stagger: Stagger children by 0.1s for grids and lists.
scroll_animations.parallax: Use Framer Motion useScroll hook for background images.

motion_and_interaction.magnetic_buttons: Wrap primary CTAs in a framer-motion component that slightly tracks the mouse cursor within a bounding box.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a premium luxury travel platform. Prioritize typography hierarchy, whitespace, and smooth motion over feature density.
instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, Shadcn UI, Lucide React.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: CRITICAL: Every interactive and key element MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-search-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_section: Must cover 100vh. Include a cinematic background image/video with a dark gradient overlay (from-black/60 to-transparent). Implement a floating frosted glass search widget with tabs/inputs (Destination, Dates, Guests).
instructions_to_main_agent.sections_required: Popular Destinations (grid/masonry with hover zoom), Featured Tours (cards with filter tabs), AI Trip Planner (interactive glassmorphic multi-step form), Special Offers (with countdown timer), Testimonials (carousel), Blog (magazine style), Footer (rich links + newsletter).
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_mode: For the Customer Dashboard, switch to a slightly denser, high-utility layout utilizing the same visual language but focusing on data clarity (trips, bookings).
instructions_to_main_agent.component_customization: Do NOT use default Shadcn styles. Override border-radius to rounded-[24px] or rounded-full. Ensure Shadcn components like Select or Dialog use the glassmorphism backdrop and correct border colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import Playfair Display and Poppins via Google Fonts. Use Playfair for Headings and Poppins for Body/UI.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use Lucide-React with a light stroke width (1.5 or 1.25) to maintain elegance.
